title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on ageing population and society.

questions.question: To what extent do you think governments are responsible for looking after the elderly, as opposed to families?
How do you think the growing proportion of elderly people in society will affect younger generations over the next few decades?

script.text: To what extent do you think governments are responsible for looking after the elderly, as opposed to families?
How do you think the growing proportion of elderly people in society will affect younger generations over the next few decades?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
